reviews.author: Lea S
reviews.text: Der beste Kaffee, den ich je getrunken habe.
reviews.textTranslated: Kopi terbaik yang pernah saya minum.

reviews.author: Mike Reviewed It!
reviews.text: Americano came out hot, beans are tasty. No wait for the early morning rush. Shop was clean and bright. I like the art work.  Would have never found this place if it hadn’t been for the sign on the sidewalk.   Glad I did find it. No wait for the coffee during the morning rush and it was delicious. Just a little hot and hurt when I spilled a bit on my hand.
reviews.textTranslated: Americano-nya panas, biji kopinya enak. Tidak perlu menunggu lama saat ramai di pagi hari. Tokonya bersih dan terang. Saya suka karya seninya. Saya tidak akan pernah menemukan tempat ini jika bukan karena papan namanya di trotoar. Senang sekali saya menemukannya. Tidak perlu menunggu lama untuk kopi saat ramai di pagi hari dan rasanya enak. Hanya sedikit panas dan terasa perih saat sedikit tumpah di tangan saya.

reviews.author: Abigail Mundy-Jackson
reviews.text: Everyone that works here is awesome!
reviews.textTranslated: Semua orang yang bekerja di sini hebat!

reviews.author: Tctgb
reviews.text: Cafe Grumpy - Financial District is a cozy and inviting spot for excellent coffee. The brews are rich and well-balanced, and the atmosphere is relaxed, perfect for a quick pick-me-up or a quiet moment. The staff is friendly and attentive, making it a reliable and enjoyable café experience in the Financial District.
reviews.textTranslated: Cafe Grumpy - Financial District adalah tempat yang nyaman dan menarik untuk menikmati kopi yang luar biasa. Kopi yang disajikan kaya rasa dan seimbang, dan suasananya santai, sempurna untuk sekadar menyegarkan diri atau menikmati momen tenang. Stafnya ramah dan penuh perhatian, menjadikan pengalaman kafe di Financial District dapat diandalkan dan menyenangkan.

reviews.author: Faisal Aziz
reviews.text: I love the coffee it’s very good
reviews.textTranslated: Saya suka kopinya, enak sekali.

reviews.author: Henry Peterson
reviews.text: Best hot chocolate I've ever had, waiters are nice and skilled, great interior design,  and inside and outside seating.
reviews.textTranslated: Cokelat panas terbaik yang pernah saya minum, pelayannya ramah dan terampil, desain interiornya bagus, dan tersedia tempat duduk di dalam dan di luar ruangan.

reviews.author: Frédéric Bruera
reviews.text: Good latte, nice atmosphere and cosy place to get a coffee.
reviews.textTranslated: Latte yang enak, suasana yang nyaman, dan tempat yang pas untuk minum kopi.

reviews.author: Jason Pierce
reviews.text: The mocha was delicious.
reviews.textTranslated: Moka-nya enak.

reviews.author: Xavier
reviews.text: Good coffee, friendly staff, no WiFi and no power outlets.
reviews.textTranslated: Kopinya enak, stafnya ramah, tapi tidak ada WiFi dan tidak ada colokan listrik.

reviews.author: Daniel Br
reviews.text: Amazing little coffee shop! Friendly barista and very clean.
reviews.textTranslated: Kedai kopi kecil yang menakjubkan! Barista ramah dan sangat bersih.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you for the kind words, Daniel. We truly appreciate your recognition of our space and baristas. We hope to serve you again soon!

reviews.author: Monique Sin
reviews.text: I’ve never been let down by their coffee. The baristas here are just so consistent and sweet! Cafe grumpy is not a place known for good pastries but they are my go-to for my daily espresso and I love them for that
reviews.textTranslated: Saya tidak pernah kecewa dengan kopi mereka. Para barista di sini sangat konsisten dan ramah! Cafe Grumpy bukanlah tempat yang terkenal dengan kue-kuenya yang enak, tetapi mereka adalah pilihan utama saya untuk espresso harian dan saya menyukai mereka karena itu.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Monique, this means so much to us. We're glad we can be your daily espresso go-to and hope to see you again soon for another one!

reviews.author: Julia S
reviews.text: Convenient grab and go location, friendly baristas, good vibes. Have had great iced americanos and cold brews here, but the drip coffee I did not enjoy. Mostly writing this review for my own future reference
reviews.textTranslated: Lokasinya praktis untuk dibawa pulang, barista ramah, suasananya menyenangkan. Saya sudah beberapa kali memesan iced americano dan cold brew yang enak di sini, tetapi kopi tetesnya kurang saya sukai. Ulasan ini sebagian besar saya tulis untuk referensi saya sendiri di masa mendatang.

reviews.author: Marisa Nowicki
reviews.text: Good spot for a matcha. The pastries were okay--I wish they had a little oven to warm them up. The lack of public bathrooms is inconvenient, so it's more of a grab-and-go coffee spot.
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat yang bagus untuk menikmati matcha. Kue-kue keringnya lumayan—saya berharap mereka punya oven kecil untuk menghangatkannya. Kurangnya toilet umum agak merepotkan, jadi tempat ini lebih cocok untuk membeli kopi sambil jalan.

reviews.author: Slava Karablikov
reviews.text: Nice cappuccino and coffee in beans selection
reviews.textTranslated: Cappuccino dan kopi dengan pilihan biji kopi yang enak.

reviews.author: Grayson
reviews.text: Deliciously brewed, great art, and really nice barista. Good selection of merch and would definitely recommend their hot chocolate.
reviews.textTranslated: Kopi yang diseduh dengan lezat, seni yang bagus, dan barista yang sangat ramah. Pilihan merchandise yang bagus dan saya pasti merekomendasikan cokelat panas mereka.

reviews.author: Andrew Chalmers
reviews.text: The espresso was decent and the space here was nice inside. The staff were helpful and friendly. The pastry was stale and hard, I didn’t even finish it (and I was pretty hungry). The coffee here is okay but I can’t really recommend the pastries here.
reviews.textTranslated: Espresso-nya lumayan dan ruangan di sini nyaman. Stafnya membantu dan ramah. Kue keringnya basi dan keras, saya bahkan tidak menghabiskannya (padahal saya sudah cukup lapar). Kopi di sini lumayan, tapi saya kurang merekomendasikan kue kering di sini.

reviews.author: Beyza
reviews.text: Lekkerste honey oat latte. Tijdens onze vakantie zijn we elke dag teruggegaan bij verschillende filialen.
reviews.textTranslated: Latte oat madu paling lezat. Kami kembali ke berbagai lokasi setiap hari selama liburan.

reviews.author: Rabeeha Adnan
reviews.text: it was 9/11 and i was not feeling great. their service made my day so much better.
reviews.textTranslated: Saat itu 11 September dan saya merasa tidak enak badan. Layanan mereka membuat hari saya jauh lebih baik.

reviews.author: Arefia Ali
reviews.text: great location. between the delicious coffee & amazing costumer service, i’m not sure what i like more!!
reviews.textTranslated: lokasinya bagus. antara kopi yang nikmat & pelayanan pelanggan yang luar biasa, saya tidak yakin mana yang lebih saya sukai!!

reviews.author: Eddie Pullis
reviews.text: Terrible!!!! They refused to serve my brother who is a victim of 9/11 just because they had a TRUMP hat on. It was 7:30 on 9/11, and he wanted coffee, but the girl told him there was no service. Disgusting.
reviews.textTranslated: Mengerikan!!!! Mereka menolak melayani saudara laki-laki saya yang merupakan korban 9/11 hanya karena mereka memakai topi TRUMP. Saat itu pukul 7.30 pada 9/11, dan dia ingin kopi, tetapi gadis itu mengatakan kepadanya bahwa tidak ada layanan. Menjijikkan.

reviews.author: Prudencia
reviews.text: Terrible!!!! The server refused to serve someone who is a victim of 9/11 just because they had a TRUMP hat on. It was 7:30 on 9/11, and he wanted coffee, but the girl told him there was no service. Disgusting.
reviews.textTranslated: Mengerikan!!!! Pelayan menolak melayani seseorang yang merupakan korban 9/11 hanya karena dia memakai topi TRUMP. Saat itu pukul 7:30 pada tanggal 9/11, dan dia ingin kopi, tetapi gadis itu mengatakan kepadanya bahwa tidak ada layanan. Menjijikkan.
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Prudencia, we're truly sorry to hear about this experience and are even more upset that it happened on 9/11– a day we are all connected to so closely in NYC that brought us together as a country. 

The actions you described were completely unacceptable. As a policy, we do not refuse service to anyone based on what they are wearing. We will be speaking with the person working that day to address what happened. 

Please feel free to contact us directly with any other concerns. You can reach us at info@cafegrumpy.com

reviews.author: Millie Sollecito
reviews.text:
Rude server
Refused to serve a 9/11 family member
reviews.textTranslated:
Pelayan yang tidak sopan
Menolak melayani anggota keluarga korban 9/11
reviews.responseFromOwner:
Millie, we truly apologize for this experience and will be speaking with our team member right away to address this issue. The actions you described are completely unacceptable, especially on 9/11. 

 You can reach us at info@cafegrumpy.com with any other concerns you may have and we thank you for bringing this to our attention. 




.

reviews.author: Andrii Guzhevnikov
reviews.text: It really worth to stop here and grab your coffee, like the quality, conversation with the team, they even know what type of beans they brew 👌🏻
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat ini benar-benar layak untuk dikunjungi dan menikmati kopi Anda, mulai dari kualitasnya, obrolan dengan timnya, hingga mereka bahkan tahu jenis biji kopi apa yang mereka gunakan 👌🏻

reviews.author: Rachel Guiles
reviews.text: Coffee is good but no wifi. Got the vanilla latte and quite tasty. Google led us astray here when we needed to work at a coffee shop. Not a good place to work if you need WiFi.
reviews.textTranslated: Kopinya enak tapi tidak ada wifi. Saya pesan vanilla latte dan rasanya cukup enak. Google menyesatkan kami ke sini ketika kami perlu bekerja di kedai kopi. Bukan tempat yang bagus untuk bekerja jika Anda membutuhkan WiFi.

reviews.author: Ann-Marie C.
reviews.text: Small but cute coffee shop. Good service. Nice place to do work or charge your devices.
reviews.textTranslated: Kedai kopi kecil tapi lucu. Pelayanan bagus. Tempat yang nyaman untuk bekerja atau mengisi daya perangkat Anda.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you for stopping by, Ann-Marie. it was a pleasure serving you and hope you choose us for another work day!

reviews.author: A F
reviews.text: Great stop for a coffee. Enjoyed the cortado and they don’t charge extra for milk alternatives (such as oat, almond, soy) which is amazing! Indoor tables available to sit in. The service was very fast even with a line. Some pastries available - the almond croissant and scone looked good!
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat yang pas untuk minum kopi. Saya menikmati cortado-nya dan mereka tidak mengenakan biaya tambahan untuk alternatif susu (seperti oat, almond, kedelai), sungguh luar biasa! Tersedia meja di dalam ruangan. Pelayanannya sangat cepat meskipun ada antrean. Tersedia beberapa kue kering - croissant almond dan scone-nya tampak lezat!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks for stopping by! We're so glad you enjoyed the cortado and yes– alternative milk on us, always! We hope to serve you again soon.

reviews.author: Ashley Castillo
reviews.text: Nice vibes, with some seating. Had the hibiscus tea which was good. Not sweet which I prefer. No WiFi or restroom
reviews.textTranslated: Suasananya menyenangkan, dengan beberapa tempat duduk. Saya memesan teh kembang sepatu yang enak. Tidak manis, yang saya sukai. Tidak ada WiFi atau toilet.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks for stopping by, Ashley! We're glad you enjoyed the hibiscus tea– it's definitely a favorite for those who prefer something less sweet. We appreciate your feedback and hope to see you again soon.

reviews.author: Anne Kealy
reviews.text: I got a lavender latte and it was quite yummy. The inside could be nicer but there wasn’t many people sitting down, so it was nice to read and hangout inside
reviews.textTranslated: Saya memesan latte lavender dan rasanya cukup enak. Interiornya bisa lebih bagus, tetapi tidak banyak orang yang duduk, jadi nyaman untuk membaca dan bersantai di dalam.
reviews.responseFromOwner: So happy to hear you enjoyed our lavender latte, Anne. It has been quite a staple for the spring season, and we're glad you got to try it. Be sure to stop by again soon–there's always something new brewing!

reviews.author: Sandra dVE
reviews.text: Great coffee and place!
reviews.textTranslated: Kopi dan tempatnya enak!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you for the feedback, Sandra! We hope to see you for another coffee soon.

reviews.author: Noneya
reviews.text: OMG delicious coffee! Smooth, excellent flavor, zero bitterness. So glad to find this place next to our hotel! Friendly staff, quiet atmosphere except for low music playing. ♥️
reviews.textTranslated: Kopinya enak banget! Lembut, rasanya luar biasa, tanpa rasa pahit. Senang sekali menemukan tempat ini di dekat hotel kami! Stafnya ramah, suasananya tenang, kecuali musik yang diputar pelan. ♥️
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks for the great feedback! We're so glad we were a great stop for you during your trip– hope to see you again next time you're in town.

reviews.author: Kate Rutigliano
reviews.text: HONEY OAT LATTE ❕
reviews.textTranslated: MADU OAT LATTE ❕

reviews.author: Steffen Schadt
reviews.text: Great coffee
reviews.textTranslated: Kopi yang enak.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks for the feedback, Steffen! Come back soon.

reviews.author: Stella Lemel
reviews.text: Cute little cafe shop.
reviews.textTranslated: Kedai kopi kecil yang lucu.

reviews.author: Laura Dixon
reviews.text: this place has some of the strongest coffee in the city. my dad got an americano, and he had low expectations given he drinks insanely strong coffee... but he was pleasantly surprised! the coffee was smooth and strong, not bitter at all. i got their honey latte, and it was great! im not a coffee expert, so i can't personally say much, but it's very solid. i definitely recommend a visit here!
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat ini punya salah satu kopi paling kuat di kota ini. Ayah saya memesan Americano, dan ekspektasinya rendah karena dia suka kopi yang luar biasa kuat... tapi dia terkejut! Kopinya lembut dan kuat, sama sekali tidak pahit. Saya memesan Honey Latte mereka, dan rasanya luar biasa! Saya bukan ahli kopi, jadi saya tidak bisa berkomentar banyak, tapi rasanya mantap. Saya sangat merekomendasikan untuk mampir ke sini!
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thank you for this feedback, Laura! We take pride in crafting strong, smooth coffee, so we're thrilled to hear that you and your dad enjoyed your drinks. Hope to see you again soon!

reviews.author: Aaron Liebowitz
reviews.text: Great spot for a coffee and a chat.
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat yang bagus untuk minum kopi dan mengobrol.
reviews.responseFromOwner: Thanks for the review, Aaron. We hope you stop by again soon!

reviews.author: Samia K
reviews.text: The reason why I give it a 3 stars is because the milk wasn’t warm enough. It seems like the barista might have rushed to make my coffee although there wasn’t any people in line. Otherwise the place has a nice vibe and is pretty spacious.
reviews.textTranslated: Alasan saya memberi bintang 3 adalah karena susunya kurang hangat. Sepertinya barista terburu-buru membuat kopi saya meskipun tidak ada antrian. Selain itu, tempatnya memiliki suasana yang nyaman dan cukup luas.

reviews.author: Wisely Chang
reviews.text: Stopped by here to grab an iced chai latte with oat milk before work and it was good. Drinks were made really quickly and I ended up sitting here for 15-30 minutes before heading to the office. Might try the honey oat latte next time!
reviews.textTranslated: Mampir ke sini untuk menikmati es chai latte dengan susu oat sebelum bekerja, dan rasanya enak. Minumannya dibuat dengan sangat cepat, dan saya akhirnya duduk di sini selama 15-30 menit sebelum berangkat ke kantor. Mungkin lain kali akan mencoba honey oat latte!

reviews.author: Zygzac
reviews.text: Gooda!
reviews.textTranslated: Bagus!

reviews.author: Stephanie Germosen
reviews.text: Latte was so good and just the right temperature. Barista was really friendly too. 10/10 will come back
reviews.textTranslated: Latte-nya enak banget dan suhunya pas. Baristanya juga ramah banget. 10/10 pasti balik lagi.

reviews.author: Bertalan Polner
reviews.text: Superb taste, very kind service
reviews.textTranslated: Rasanya luar biasa, pelayanannya sangat ramah.

reviews.author: Francis
reviews.text: Love this location! It’s very very pretty and the staff are usually quick and kind
reviews.textTranslated: Suka banget sama tempatnya! Cantik banget dan stafnya juga sigap dan ramah.

reviews.author: Faraz Kamili
reviews.text: Good espresso.
reviews.textTranslated: Espresso yang enak.

reviews.author: Stephanie S
reviews.text: If I could give this coffee place 0 stars I would. My friends and I have had awful service at this location awhile back and it hasn’t changed. Definitely never coming back here. I came here awhile ago and one of the workers was slamming things on the counter and we left because we felt so unsafe.
reviews.textTranslated: Kalau boleh kasih 0 bintang untuk kedai kopi ini, saya akan kasih. Saya dan teman-teman pernah dapat pelayanan yang buruk di sini beberapa waktu lalu, dan pelayanannya tidak berubah. Pasti tidak akan balik lagi ke sini. Saya pernah ke sini beberapa waktu lalu, dan salah satu karyawannya membanting barang-barang di meja, dan kami pun pergi karena merasa sangat tidak aman.

reviews.author: Fatima Rajput
reviews.text: The worst matcha I ever had.
reviews.textTranslated: Matcha terburuk yang pernah saya minum.

reviews.author: Jan Střecha
reviews.text: One of the best flat whites I ever had
reviews.textTranslated: Salah satu flat white terbaik yang pernah saya coba

reviews.author: Tolu Owodunni
reviews.text: solid. cant go wrong with cafe grumpy
reviews.textTranslated: Mantap. Tidak akan salah pilih dengan Cafe Grumpy.

reviews.author: Adam Machanic
reviews.text:
The coffee was exceptionally good. Quite possibly the best americano I’ve ever had.

Unfortunately service was a bit curt and the shop seemed out of a lot of stuff. Pastry case was empty, for example.

Would have liked something to go with my coffee, so I’m deducting a star, but really, the coffee is great.
reviews.textTranslated:
Kopinya sangat enak. Mungkin americano terbaik yang pernah saya minum.

Sayangnya, pelayanannya agak kurang ramah dan toko itu sepertinya kehabisan banyak barang. Etalase kue-kue, misalnya, kosong.

Saya ingin sesuatu untuk menemani kopi saya, jadi saya mengurangi satu bintang, tetapi sungguh, kopinya enak sekali.

reviews.author: Antonina P.
reviews.text: I'm a fan of the cafe, great matcha lattes, service can be hit or miss but coffee is good.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya penggemar kafe ini, matcha latte-nya enak sekali, pelayanannya kadang bagus kadang kurang, tapi kopinya enak.

reviews.author: Tanzeel urRehman
reviews.text:
Really good coffee.

Small (right size) servings because they don't wanna compensate for bad quality
reviews.textTranslated:
Kopinya enak banget.

Porsinya kecil (ukuran pas) karena mereka nggak mau menutupi kualitas yang buruk.

reviews.author: Teray Perry
reviews.text: Best Coffee In NYC. It is directly across from The Fidi hotel. Coffee is impressive
reviews.textTranslated: Kopi terbaik di NYC. Lokasinya tepat di seberang Hotel Fidi. Kopinya luar biasa.

reviews.author: Julie
reviews.text: I had the perfect vanilla latte from Cafe Grumpy. There was no wait on a late Sunday morning and the ambiance of the shop was casual and cozy. Definitely recommend!
reviews.textTranslated: Saya menikmati vanilla latte yang sempurna di Cafe Grumpy. Tidak ada antrian meskipun hari Minggu pagi sudah siang, dan suasana kedainya santai dan nyaman. Sangat direkomendasikan!

reviews.author: Daphne C
reviews.text: Depending on the barista this place could be a hit or miss. I did enjoy my iced latte the last time I went though.
reviews.textTranslated: Tergantung baristanya, tempat ini bisa jadi favorit atau tidak. Tapi terakhir kali ke sana, saya menikmati es latte saya.

reviews.author: Sam Hernandez
reviews.text: Really disappointed in this cafe. I ordered an iced matcha latte made with almond milk and it was awful. It had no flavor or sweetened at all - it just tasted like almond milk. When I asked about sweetener, I was told that they don't sweeten it at all, and the only thing they could sweeten it with was honey (not vegan), and my other option was for me to add simple syrup myself from the back counter. For over eight dollars for an iced matcha, you'd think it'd already be sweetened to a certain degree and not be required to sweeten it yourself.
reviews.textTranslated: Kecewa banget sama kafe ini. Saya pesan iced matcha latte yang pakai susu almond, dan rasanya nggak enak. Rasanya nggak ada rasa dan nggak manis sama sekali—cuma kayak susu almond. Waktu saya tanya soal pemanis, mereka bilang mereka nggak pakai pemanis sama sekali, dan cuma bisa pakai madu (bukan vegan). Pilihan saya yang lain sih, saya tinggal tambahin sirup gula dari konter belakang. Dengan harga lebih dari delapan dolar untuk iced matcha, mungkin Anda pikir matchanya sudah dimaniskan sampai batas tertentu dan Anda nggak perlu menambahkan pemanis sendiri.

reviews.author: HANE Xxxx
reviews.text: A solid coffee place with good pastries (and matcha). The ambiance is minimalistic but cute,  especially a little nook in the back. Perfect for a private conversation or a group catchup (over 3 ppl)
reviews.textTranslated: Kedai kopi yang mantap dengan kue-kue yang lezat (dan matcha). Suasananya minimalis namun manis, terutama sudut kecil di belakangnya. Sempurna untuk mengobrol pribadi atau ngobrol bersama (lebih dari 3 orang).

reviews.author: Steven Epstein
reviews.text: Had a bad experience this morning with rude staff. Have been coming here for years as I work in the area. They overcharged me for a drink I have been buying for years saying they have a new policy to charge differently for iced versions. Sounds suspect! More importantly, they made a mistake in making the drink and rather than simply remake it, they did so with an obnoxious attitude particularly from one staff person who seemed to be managing the others. I know this is “Grumpy Coffee” but……..
reviews.textTranslated: Punya pengalaman buruk pagi ini dengan staf yang kasar. Sudah bertahun-tahun saya datang ke sini karena saya bekerja di daerah ini. Mereka menagih saya terlalu mahal untuk minuman yang sudah saya beli selama bertahun-tahun, katanya mereka punya kebijakan baru untuk menagih harga berbeda untuk versi es. Kedengarannya mencurigakan! Lebih penting lagi, mereka membuat kesalahan dalam membuat minumannya, dan alih-alih membuatnya ulang, mereka melakukannya dengan sikap yang menjengkelkan, terutama dari salah satu staf yang tampaknya mengelola yang lain. Saya tahu ini "Kopi Pemarah", tapi……..

reviews.author: Jenn Y
reviews.text: Enjoyed the coffee
reviews.textTranslated: Menikmati kopinya

reviews.author: Sunny Vari
reviews.text:
One of the worst attitudes of the server I have seen. This lady first of all goofed up in the number of our coffees, on top of that when asked about it - she made faces and made the next one such a bad one plus the coffee was spilling everywhere... Don't know if she made a new one or just gave some something already left there.

Horrible!!!
reviews.textTranslated:
Salah satu sikap pelayan terburuk yang pernah saya lihat. Pertama-tama, wanita ini salah menghitung jumlah kopi kami, dan ketika ditanya tentang hal itu, dia malah cemberut dan membuat kopi berikutnya sangat buruk, ditambah lagi kopinya tumpah ke mana-mana... Saya tidak tahu apakah dia membuat kopi baru atau hanya memberikan sesuatu yang sudah ada di sana.

Mengerikan!!!

reviews.author: juan del franco
reviews.text:
Rico café
Sin baño
reviews.textTranslated:
Kopi enak
Tidak ada kamar mandi

reviews.author: Iara P
reviews.text: Good coffee. Rebecca is the best barista.
reviews.textTranslated: Kopinya enak. Rebecca adalah barista terbaik.

reviews.author: Tatiana
reviews.text: Fine!
reviews.textTranslated: Bagus!

reviews.author: Marie
reviews.text: Delicious matcha
reviews.textTranslated: Matcha yang lezat

reviews.author: Clara Parker
reviews.text: Top quality coffee
reviews.textTranslated: Kopi kualitas terbaik

reviews.author: Lester “LesterRealtordotcom” Remhof
reviews.text: Great local coffee and pastry with friendly service - thank you
reviews.textTranslated: Kopi dan kue lokal yang enak dengan pelayanan ramah - terima kasih.

reviews.author: SJ
reviews.text: Average coffee and bad service. Skip.
reviews.textTranslated: Kopinya biasa saja dan pelayanannya buruk. Lewatkan saja.

reviews.author: Dr. Mabuse
reviews.text: Used to be great.  Recently they totally changed the staff, now I avoid it.
reviews.textTranslated: Dulu bagus. Baru-baru ini stafnya diganti total, sekarang saya menghindarinya.

reviews.author: Alison Deloitte
reviews.text: Cafe times are inaccurate,,, good thing there are plenty of other coffee shops in the area.
reviews.textTranslated: Waktu di kafe tidak akurat,,, untung saja ada banyak kedai kopi lain di area tersebut.

reviews.author: Stephen S
reviews.text:
Tried to grab a coffee on Jan 8th at 745.   The door was locked, and the woman behind the counter walked up to the door and with it locked said she wasn't open, I said the sign said you open at 7 am.

She said "Well I was late" A man walked up behind me and said I placed an order for pick up, and she let him in...

Normally they have great coffee, but this type of ignorance would not make a solid cup of coffee
reviews.textTranslated:
Mencoba mengambil kopi pada 8 Januari pukul 19.45. Pintunya terkunci, dan wanita di balik meja kasir menghampiri pintu dan saat pintunya terkunci, dia bilang dia tidak buka. Saya bilang papan nama di sana bertuliskan buka pukul 07.00.

Dia bilang, "Wah, saya terlambat." Seorang pria berjalan di belakang saya dan bilang saya memesan kopi untuk diambil, dan dia memperbolehkannya masuk...

Biasanya mereka punya kopi yang enak, tapi ketidaktahuan seperti ini tidak akan menghasilkan secangkir kopi yang nikmat.

reviews.author: Alvaro L
reviews.text: Times are incorrect: it says it opens at 7 on Google and on the door, just showed up at 7:30 and it’s closed - if you open at 8, say it!  Don’t waste people’s time
reviews.textTranslated: Waktunya salah: tertulis buka jam 7 di Google dan di pintu, baru datang jam 7.30 dan sudah tutup - kalau buka jam 8, sebutkan! Jangan buang-buang waktu orang.

reviews.author: Woosah
reviews.text: Just like it's 42nd & Lexington store, spot on with the cappuccino. Will definitely choose grumpy when I work near one..
reviews.textTranslated: Sama seperti toko 42nd & Lexington-nya, pas banget sama cappuccino-nya. Pasti bakal pilih Grumpy kalau kerja di dekat situ.

reviews.author: Mehdi S
reviews.text: Super nice staff, excellent coffee, very cozy coffee shop
reviews.textTranslated: Stafnya sangat ramah, kopinya enak sekali, kedai kopinya sangat nyaman.

reviews.author: Hridoy Mondol
reviews.text:
The service here has been very good! The morning team is amazing! Fast at getting food and drinks out.

Service is great - very friendly & positive team.
reviews.textTranslated:
Pelayanan di sini sangat bagus! Tim pagi luar biasa! Cepat dalam menyajikan makanan dan minuman.

Pelayanannya hebat - timnya sangat ramah & positif.

reviews.author: Tess
reviews.text: Perfect, finally a real cappuccino.
reviews.textTranslated: Sempurna, akhirnya cappuccino sungguhan.

reviews.author: Daniel Sorrell
reviews.text: Good coffee though the location in Greenpoint has more space
reviews.textTranslated: Kopinya enak, meskipun lokasi di Greenpoint lebih luas.

reviews.author: Con Papadopoulos
reviews.text: Great coffee
reviews.textTranslated: Kopi yang enak.

reviews.author: Sergey Sardaryan
reviews.text: Single origin espresso is amazing!
reviews.textTranslated: Espresso single origin itu luar biasa!

reviews.author: Giulia B
reviews.text: Good coffee (a bit too acid the espresso) and relaxing environment! :)
reviews.textTranslated: Kopi yang enak (espresso-nya agak terlalu asam) dan suasana yang santai! :)

reviews.author: Tidalus
reviews.text: While I didn't have anything (I was caffeined up already), my family needed a pick me up and we found this really pleasant spot. While it was a nice place to sit, the menu did look good enough to put on my " come back to list. "
reviews.textTranslated: Meskipun saya tidak minum apa-apa (saya sudah minum kafein), keluarga saya butuh penyemangat dan kami menemukan tempat yang sangat nyaman ini. Meskipun tempatnya nyaman untuk duduk, menunya terlihat cukup menarik untuk saya masukkan ke dalam daftar "return to list" saya.

reviews.author: marta zaleska
reviews.text: Unfortunatelly coffee is acid and my cortado was far from tasty. But the staff very friendly
reviews.textTranslated: Sayangnya kopi di sini asam dan cortado saya rasanya tidak enak. Tapi stafnya sangat ramah.

reviews.author: Maria H
reviews.text: The coffee wasn't as good as expected. A bit watery and not creamy enough for a flat white.
reviews.textTranslated: Kopinya tidak seenak yang diharapkan. Agak encer dan kurang creamy untuk flat white.

reviews.author: Lisa Gervitz
reviews.text: Watery Chai Lattes. I get the name now. Who wouldn’t be grumpy wasting money.
reviews.textTranslated: Chai Latte encer. Sekarang saya mengerti namanya. Siapa yang tidak akan kesal jika membuang-buang uang?

reviews.author: Nicholas Tripp
reviews.text: No pour over
reviews.textTranslated: Tidak ada metode seduh tuang

reviews.author: Murilo Garcia
reviews.text:
Excelente café, tomei um single origin Guatemala.

Ótimo atendimento, cordialidade e simpatia.
reviews.textTranslated:
Kopi yang sangat enak, saya memesan kopi single origin Guatemala.

Pelayanan luar biasa, ramah dan menyenangkan.

reviews.author: Marinated Cocaine
reviews.text: Great coffee! The baked goods are good. The staff is friendly and really nice to talk to! However the music is TERRIBLE!!!! Also there is no WC 🥲
reviews.textTranslated: Kopinya enak! Kue-kuenya juga enak. Stafnya ramah dan asyik diajak ngobrol! Tapi musiknya BURUK BANGET!!!! Toiletnya juga nggak ada 🥲

reviews.author: Tomasz Czajkowski
reviews.text: Nice place, good & cheap coffee.
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat yang bagus, kopi enak dan murah.

reviews.author: Patrick McNamara
reviews.text: Actually space to sit, friendly staff
reviews.textTranslated: Sebenarnya ada ruang untuk duduk, staf yang ramah

reviews.author: Krystian Król
reviews.text: I liked their coffee, definitely a solid pick in the area.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya suka kopi mereka, benar-benar pilihan yang bagus di daerah ini.

reviews.author: L
reviews.text: Such a cute cafe, I loved the concept and their jelly donut. U’ll never find me grumpy here
reviews.textTranslated: Kafe yang sangat lucu, saya suka konsepnya dan donat isi selainya. Anda tidak akan pernah menemukan saya cemberut di sini.

reviews.author: Michael Regier
reviews.text: Friendly,  friendly, friendly!  Welcoming, helpful, and knowledgeable.   I had an Americano (Heartbreaker Espresso) with the cardamom coffee cake.  1960's comic book BAM ... POW!  Cardamom coffee cake is fl of flavor, a floral explosion that softens to a wonderful, soft woodland flowery spiciness.  The medium body Espresso brings out a nutmeg finish yet introduces a lift to the cardamom.   Extraordinary experience.
reviews.textTranslated: Ramah, ramah, ramah! Ramah, membantu, dan berpengetahuan. Saya menikmati Americano (Heartbreaker Espresso) dengan kue kopi kapulaga. Buku komik tahun 1960-an, BAM... POW! Kue kopi kapulaga memiliki cita rasa yang luar biasa, ledakan bunga yang melunak menjadi rasa pedas bunga hutan yang lembut dan nikmat. Espresso dengan rasa sedang ini memberikan sentuhan akhir pala namun tetap memberikan sentuhan kapulaga yang lebih kuat. Pengalaman yang luar biasa.

reviews.author: Maria Guzman Bague
reviews.text: This coffee shop is a delightful retreat for coffee enthusiasts and casual drinkers alike. Situated conveniently, it provides a perfect blend of urban chic ambiance with a cozy, welcoming vibe.
reviews.textTranslated: Kedai kopi ini adalah tempat yang menyenangkan bagi para pencinta kopi maupun penikmat kopi kasual. Terletak di lokasi yang strategis, kedai ini menawarkan perpaduan sempurna antara suasana urban yang apik dengan nuansa yang nyaman dan ramah.

reviews.author: valeria eusse
reviews.text: Ian was really really nice and put up with my request for a warm latte, he even did some art, really cool guy
reviews.textTranslated: Ian sangat baik dan sabar memenuhi permintaan saya untuk latte hangat, dia bahkan membuat beberapa karya seni, benar-benar pria yang keren.

reviews.author: Janhvi
reviews.text: Great coffee and friendly staff. Quick service.
reviews.textTranslated: Kopi yang enak dan staf yang ramah. Pelayanan cepat.

reviews.author: coles
reviews.text: they don’t use ceremonial matcha yet charge $7.35 :/
reviews.textTranslated: Mereka tidak menggunakan matcha khusus untuk upacara minum teh, tetapi mematok harga $7,35 :/

reviews.author: Mona A
reviews.text: Good coffee and best vibe - only Taylor Swift music. Loved it!
reviews.textTranslated: Kopi enak dan suasana terbaik - hanya musik Taylor Swift. Suka banget!

reviews.author: Allen
reviews.text: $4.25 for a shot of espresso and no wifi. While Im okay paying a premium in FiDi, the lack of wifi was pretty frustrating. The espresso itself was pretty decent and the service was good.
reviews.textTranslated: $4,25 untuk segelas espresso dan tanpa Wi-Fi. Meskipun saya tidak keberatan membayar premi di FiDi, ketiadaan Wi-Fi cukup membuat frustrasi. Espressonya sendiri cukup enak dan layanannya bagus.

reviews.author: Rod Thomas
reviews.text: Really lovely staff
reviews.textTranslated: Stafnya sangat ramah.

reviews.author: Nick Mav
reviews.text: Perfect Coffee!
reviews.textTranslated: Kopi yang sempurna!

reviews.author: Thomas Moore
reviews.text:
Nothing special,

An, imo, overpriced “vibe”
reviews.textTranslated:
Tidak ada yang istimewa,

Suasananya, menurut saya, terlalu mahal.

reviews.author: Nofar Rimon
reviews.text: Very nice café with great coffee and pastries. Not too expensive and staff is nice. If they had sandwiches as well it could be even better.
reviews.textTranslated: Kafe yang sangat bagus dengan kopi dan kue-kue yang lezat. Harganya tidak terlalu mahal dan stafnya ramah. Kalau mereka juga menyediakan sandwich, pasti lebih enak lagi.

reviews.author: Kanaka pssm
reviews.text: Wasn’t happy with the cappuccino taste or presentation. People’s friendly and helpful.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya tidak puas dengan rasa dan penyajian cappuccino-nya. Para pegawainya ramah dan membantu.

reviews.author: Sisyphus Chen
reviews.text: great
reviews.textTranslated: Besar

reviews.author: Iulian B
reviews.text: When you're grumpy you can buy your coffee here. 😠
reviews.textTranslated: Kalau lagi galau, kamu bisa beli kopi di sini. 😠

reviews.author: Rachel Grosso
reviews.text: Great coffee and service. No wifi
reviews.textTranslated: Kopi dan pelayanannya luar biasa. Tidak ada wifi.

reviews.author: Alexander Lavin
reviews.text: Okay
reviews.textTranslated: Oke

reviews.author: Jule
reviews.text: Nichts besonderes, einfach ok.
reviews.textTranslated: Tidak ada yang istimewa, biasa saja.

reviews.author: asraf ramli
reviews.text: Decent coffee with a cool vibe. Really apt for a coffee place to go with “grumpy” for a coffee place, which is basically the state of most coffee people before having their first sip of espresso. Good range of pastries.
reviews.textTranslated: Kopinya lumayan dengan suasana yang keren. Cocok sekali untuk tempat kopi yang sedang naik daun, tapi juga cocok untuk tempat kopi yang "gampang marah", yang pada dasarnya adalah kondisi kebanyakan penikmat kopi sebelum menyesap espresso pertama mereka. Pilihan kue keringnya juga lengkap.

reviews.author: Lafaye Hoover
reviews.text: Perfect place to enjoy some coffee and to get out of the rain!
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat yang sempurna untuk menikmati kopi dan terhindar dari hujan!

reviews.author: et J
reviews.text: 같은 거를 시켰는데 우유 스티밍 하는 숙련도가 다름. 스티밍 잘한 커피는 $7 달러 가치가 있고 아닌 거는 없음
reviews.textTranslated: Saya memesan hal yang sama, tetapi tingkat keahlian mengukus susu bervariasi. Kopi yang dikukus dengan baik harganya $7, dan yang buruk tidak ada harganya.

reviews.author: Salvador Torró
reviews.text: Great coofee place !
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat kopi yang bagus!

reviews.author: William Cherniak
reviews.text: This place is a joke. Says they open 8am on weekends. Pitch black no one there at 830am on Saturday.
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat ini cuma lelucon. Katanya buka jam 8 pagi di akhir pekan. Gelap gulita, tidak ada seorang pun di sana jam 8.30 pagi hari Sabtu.

reviews.author: Jeffrey Katz
reviews.text:
Not a lot of atmosphere to be had here, but it is clean and they have some nice shiny machines for the baristas to use to make your ☕ beverage.

The staff is friendly and they do put a nice flourish on the top of your coffee which is nice. The coffee creations are good, and well crafted without the intense over powering of the place on every street corner in the city (which will remain nameless). And it doesn't seem to get crowded which is nice too.

They also offer a nice selection of Chemex coffee equipment and accessories for purchase.
reviews.textTranslated:
Suasananya tidak terlalu ramai, tetapi bersih dan mereka memiliki beberapa mesin berkilau yang bagus untuk digunakan para barista membuat minuman ☕ Anda.

Stafnya ramah dan mereka menambahkan sentuhan manis pada kopi Anda, yang merupakan hal yang menyenangkan. Kreasi kopinya enak, dan diracik dengan baik tanpa kesan berlebihan dari tempat ini di setiap sudut jalan di kota (yang tidak akan disebutkan namanya). Dan tempat ini juga tidak terasa ramai, yang juga menyenangkan.

Mereka juga menawarkan berbagai pilihan peralatan dan aksesori kopi Chemex yang menarik untuk dibeli.

reviews.author: Soran
reviews.text: Their brewed coffee is some of the best I’ve had, but the lack of wi-fi, outlets, and bathroom is unfortunate. Plan to hotspot from your phone if you want to work here—the tables are nice and big and the chairs are comfy.
reviews.textTranslated: Kopi seduh mereka termasuk yang terbaik yang pernah saya minum, tapi sayangnya tidak ada Wi-Fi, stopkontak, dan kamar mandi. Rencanakan untuk menggunakan hotspot dari ponsel Anda jika ingin bekerja di sini—mejanya bagus dan besar, dan kursinya nyaman.

reviews.author: Robert Didriksen
reviews.text: The tumeric hot cider is delicious! Perfect for a cool fall day :)
reviews.textTranslated: Sari apel hangat kunyit ini enak sekali! Sangat cocok untuk hari musim gugur yang sejuk :)

reviews.author: Yaakov Bressler
reviews.text:
Snug coffee shop in Financial District. On weekends, this place is spacious with a cozy seating area. (I haven’t been there during the week, so maybe it’s a different situation then?) Service is top quality - the lates here are delightful!

I don’t recall there being a bathroom at this location.
reviews.textTranslated:
Kedai kopi yang nyaman di Financial District. Pada akhir pekan, tempat ini luas dengan area tempat duduk yang nyaman. (Saya belum pernah ke sana pada hari kerja, jadi mungkin situasinya berbeda?) Pelayanannya berkualitas tinggi - latte di sini sangat enak!

Saya tidak ingat ada kamar mandi di lokasi ini.

reviews.author: Jillian Petro
reviews.text: Was so excited to visit mostly because of the name, but it was aptly named for the one employee there when we visited. It was deserted, and we seemed to annoy the one employee when we entered too. Asked what syrups they had and was just pointed to the sign by the register. Super helpful! 😂 and only pumpkin and vanilla was an option. Very slim pickings! No bathroom either. Super bummed by the experience. Not a terrible coffee but nothing exciting.
reviews.textTranslated: Awalnya saya sangat antusias untuk berkunjung, terutama karena namanya, tetapi ternyata nama itu memang sesuai dengan karakter satu-satunya karyawan di sana saat kami berkunjung. Tempatnya sepi, dan sepertinya kami juga mengganggu satu-satunya karyawan saat masuk. Saya bertanya sirup apa saja yang tersedia dan mereka hanya menunjuk ke papan di dekat kasir. Sangat membantu! 😂 dan hanya ada pilihan rasa labu dan vanila. Pilihannya sangat terbatas! Tidak ada kamar mandi juga. Sangat kecewa dengan pengalaman tersebut. Kopinya tidak buruk, tetapi juga tidak ada yang istimewa.

reviews.author: Keysa López
reviews.text: Great coffee and beautiful interior design!
reviews.textTranslated: Kopi yang enak dan desain interior yang indah!

reviews.author: Benjamin A
reviews.text: Excellent coffee. Scandi vibe. Quiet during the day.
reviews.textTranslated: Kopi yang luar biasa. Suasana Skandinavia. Tenang di siang hari.

reviews.author: Carla Jou Fuyà
reviews.text: Em vaig demanar un cupcake de blueberry que va resultar estar molt bo, però el que encara estava més bo i replet de canyella com a mi m'agrada va ser el Chai Latte que vaig demanar amb llet vegetal. Un dels millors que he provat mai. Molt contenta amb la cafeteria!
reviews.textTranslated: Saya memesan cupcake blueberry yang ternyata sangat enak, tetapi yang lebih enak lagi dan penuh dengan kayu manis seperti yang saya suka adalah Chai Latte yang saya pesan dengan susu nabati. Salah satu yang terbaik yang pernah saya coba. Sangat puas dengan kafe ini!

reviews.author: Isabel Lozano
reviews.text: Está bien pero solo para un café, si quieres algo un poco diferente no lo vas a encontrar.
reviews.textTranslated: Tidak apa-apa, tetapi hanya untuk minum kopi saja. Kalau Anda ingin sesuatu yang sedikit berbeda, Anda tidak akan menemukannya.

reviews.author: Darren Colvil
reviews.text: Rafael made us the best iced lattes in New York City
reviews.textTranslated: Rafael membuatkan kami es latte terbaik di Kota New York.

reviews.author: Sibrina Subedar
reviews.text: Nice place to take a break from the heat outside. I just had sparkling water. Others in the group who had coffee and mocha also stunned satisfied
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat yang bagus untuk beristirahat dari panasnya di luar. Saya hanya memesan air mineral. Anggota kelompok lain yang memesan kopi dan moka juga tampak puas.

reviews.author: Mark
reviews.text: Great friendly staff. The coffee was good and the merch is hilarious. We ended up buying 3 mugs impulsively.
reviews.textTranslated: Stafnya ramah dan menyenangkan. Kopinya enak dan merchandise-nya lucu sekali. Kami akhirnya membeli 3 mug secara impulsif.

reviews.author: Vered A
reviews.text: Great service! Best soy milk coffee in NYC!
reviews.textTranslated: Pelayanan luar biasa! Kopi susu kedelai terbaik di NYC!

reviews.author: Ela Melouk
reviews.text: Got a cappuccino it was great!
reviews.textTranslated: Mendapat secangkir cappuccino, rasanya enak!

reviews.author: Nata Ro
reviews.text: Quick service and very good coffee. Minimalistic interior, of that matters.
reviews.textTranslated: Pelayanannya cepat dan kopinya enak sekali. Interiornya minimalis, itu yang penting.

reviews.author: Ander Murias
reviews.text:
Good coffe and great service! totally recommended for anyone around 😊☕

Genial para tomar un café en el distrito financiero, ademas, la camarera súper maja y atenta
reviews.textTranslated:
Kopinya enak dan pelayanannya juga bagus! Sangat direkomendasikan untuk siapa pun di sekitar sini 😊☕

Cocok untuk ngopi di kawasan finansial, ditambah lagi pelayannya sangat ramah dan perhatian.

reviews.author: JAVIER MARTIN
reviews.text: Un magnífico café hecho con cariño por una estupenda persona.🙂
reviews.textTranslated: Kopi nikmat yang dibuat dengan cinta oleh orang yang luar biasa.🙂

reviews.author: Maika Espeso
reviews.text: Very good latte!!!
reviews.textTranslated: Latte-nya enak sekali!!!

reviews.author: Nicolás Dueñas
reviews.text: Nice coffee and environment. Good location.
reviews.textTranslated: Kopi dan suasananya enak. Lokasinya bagus.

reviews.author: Gavin Martin
reviews.text: Nice tasty coffee. Nice to have milk variations offered up front. Would be nice to be able to have size options but overall a tasty cup.
reviews.textTranslated: Kopi yang enak dan lezat. Senang rasanya ada pilihan susu yang ditawarkan di awal. Akan lebih baik jika ada pilihan ukuran, tetapi secara keseluruhan, secangkir kopi yang enak.

reviews.author: Gabriel Cuevas
reviews.text: Excelente lugar para pedir un buen café acompañado de un buen pan.
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat yang sangat baik untuk memesan kopi yang enak ditemani roti yang lezat.

reviews.author: Fabian Bogazzi
reviews.text: Coffee and tea are nothing special, no WC, no wi-fi, no food or cakes, no proper heating
reviews.textTranslated: Kopi dan tehnya biasa saja, tidak ada toilet, tidak ada Wi-Fi, tidak ada makanan atau kue, dan tidak ada pemanas ruangan yang memadai.

reviews.author: G Slender
reviews.text: One of the rare good coffee places in the USA
reviews.textTranslated: Salah satu dari sedikit tempat kopi yang bagus di AS.

reviews.author: Skyler Abruscati
reviews.text: Had a seasonal honey oat milk latte that was delicious - one of the best lattes I’ve had in a while. The place has indoor seating, good vibes and nice music too. Only thing to be aware of is that there are no public restrooms or WIFI.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya menikmati latte susu oat madu musiman yang lezat - salah satu latte terenak yang pernah saya minum. Tempat ini memiliki tempat duduk di dalam ruangan, suasana yang nyaman, dan musik yang asyik juga. Satu-satunya hal yang perlu diperhatikan adalah tidak ada toilet umum atau Wi-Fi.

reviews.author: Stephanie Sanchez
reviews.text: Coffee was delicious! And stuff there are super friendly! Definitely recommend
reviews.textTranslated: Kopinya enak! Dan stafnya sangat ramah! Sangat direkomendasikan.

reviews.author: Jennifer Jill Araya
reviews.text: Cute cafe to rest after the Statue of Liberty / Ellis Island tour. Barista was very friendly and gladly altered a drink for me. Well be visiting again for sure!
reviews.textTranslated: Kafe yang nyaman untuk beristirahat setelah tur Patung Liberty/Pulau Ellis. Baristanya sangat ramah dan dengan senang hati menyiapkan minuman untuk saya. Pasti akan berkunjung lagi!

reviews.author: Gabriel
reviews.text:
Cozy place where you can experience real coffee and have a chill vibe.

They use real cups, have latte art and wonderful customer service.
reviews.textTranslated:
Tempat nyaman di mana Anda dapat menikmati kopi asli dan suasana santai.

Mereka menggunakan cangkir asli, memiliki seni latte, dan layanan pelanggan yang luar biasa.

reviews.author: Sharon Tsooker (‫שרון צוקר‬‎)
reviews.text: Nice place! Really love the theme of the place
reviews.textTranslated: Tempatnya bagus! Suka banget sama temanya.

reviews.author: David Vardumyan
reviews.text: Terrible and expensive soya cappuccino with no latte art. Unfriendly and impolite service.
reviews.textTranslated: Cappuccino kedelai yang mengerikan dan mahal tanpa latte art. Pelayanan tidak ramah dan tidak sopan.

reviews.author: Sarah
reviews.text:
that oat milk latte ✨✨

small, cozy - no wifi or bathroom, but still a great little spot with indoor and outdoor tables.
reviews.textTranslated:
Latte susu oat itu ✨✨

Kecil, nyaman - tidak ada wifi atau kamar mandi, tapi tetap tempat kecil yang bagus dengan meja di dalam dan luar ruangan.

reviews.author: hadi b
reviews.text: Great coffee, nice waitress.
reviews.textTranslated: Kopinya enak, pelayannya ramah.

reviews.author: Unnamed Muffin
reviews.text: One of the best coffees in New York City. I especially recommend latte with honey, it's magical! ^_^
reviews.textTranslated: Salah satu kopi terbaik di New York City. Saya sangat merekomendasikan latte dengan madu, rasanya luar biasa! ^_^

reviews.author: Robson
reviews.text: Very good
reviews.textTranslated: Sangat bagus

reviews.author: Samantha Sigelakis-Minski
reviews.text: I miss Grumpy so much. They are so nice (funnily enough), they are helpful if you don't know what you want, and their quality is top notch. The matcha is made hand whisked on site. Their ingredients are fresh and everything comes out baller. However they are pricey because of this, and it is a bit of a wait. Worth it.
reviews.textTranslated: Aku sangat merindukan Grumpy. Mereka sangat ramah (lucunya), mereka membantu jika kamu tidak tahu apa yang kamu inginkan, dan kualitasnya sangat bagus. Matcha-nya dibuat dengan tangan dan dikocok di tempat. Bahan-bahannya segar dan semuanya terasa luar biasa. Namun, karena itu harganya agak mahal, dan harus menunggu sedikit. Tapi sepadan.

reviews.author: Tim Montague
reviews.text: Must try the turmeric latte! Awesome place for coffee and quick bite.
reviews.textTranslated: Wajib coba latte kunyitnya! Tempat yang bagus untuk minum kopi dan makan ringan.

reviews.author: Greg Chianetta
reviews.text: No wifi and unfriendly barista.
reviews.textTranslated: Tidak ada wifi dan barista tidak ramah.

reviews.author: Steven Eisenpreis
reviews.text: Didn't enter
reviews.textTranslated: Tidak masuk

reviews.author: Kaidi Zhang
reviews.text: Cute shop, coffee was ok
reviews.textTranslated: Tokonya bagus, kopinya lumayan

reviews.author: Aleksandar Dimitrov
reviews.text: Nice drinks and atmosphere but puzzled how such a place does not have a restroom for customers - that is borderline illegal.
reviews.textTranslated: Minuman dan suasananya enak, tetapi saya bingung mengapa tempat seperti itu tidak memiliki toilet untuk pelanggan - itu hampir ilegal.

reviews.author: Sean Case
reviews.text: Coffee is great, and the lemon loaf was delicious.  But the lemon loaf needed to be more lemony and icing per my kids!
reviews.textTranslated: Kopinya enak, dan roti lemonnya juga enak. Tapi menurut anak-anak saya, roti lemonnya perlu lebih banyak rasa lemon dan icing-nya!

reviews.author: Carola Bartz
reviews.text: Sweet little coffee shop with great coffee and tasty pastries. The lattes were beautifully made with excellent coffee. I had the salted caramel doughnut which was delicious.
reviews.textTranslated: Kedai kopi kecil yang manis dengan kopi yang enak dan kue-kue yang lezat. Latte-nya dibuat dengan indah dengan kopi yang sangat enak. Saya memesan donat karamel asin yang sangat lezat.

reviews.author: Michal Moeller
reviews.text: Atmosphere is adorable, fun, and quiet! The employees are extremely knowledgeable and very nice. Their drinks are delicious!! Overall a great place to stop.
reviews.textTranslated: Suasananya menggemaskan, menyenangkan, dan tenang! Para karyawannya sangat berpengetahuan dan sangat ramah. Minumannya enak sekali!! Secara keseluruhan, tempat yang bagus untuk dikunjungi.

reviews.author: Douglas Ennis
reviews.text: Great coffee spot
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat ngopi yang bagus

reviews.author: Shireen Bhullar
reviews.text: Love the name, of course! That's what caught my attention in the first place. I tried their oat mocha and it was made well. Perfect espresso to mocha to milk consistency. They have very limited seating so it isn't the ideal place to work out of. Even though they don't have wifi, I am generally able to catch the wifi of the neighboring restaurants (I'm sure they don't mind haha). They also don't have a restroom so it is a nice lets hang out grab a cup of coffee place but not somewhere you can chill for long.
reviews.textTranslated: Saya suka namanya, tentu saja! Itulah yang pertama kali menarik perhatian saya. Saya mencoba oat mocha mereka dan rasanya enak. Konsistensi espresso, mocha, dan susu yang sempurna. Tempat duduknya sangat terbatas, jadi bukan tempat yang ideal untuk bekerja. Meskipun mereka tidak memiliki wifi, saya biasanya bisa mendapatkan wifi dari restoran tetangga (saya yakin mereka tidak keberatan haha). Mereka juga tidak memiliki toilet, jadi tempat ini cocok untuk nongkrong sambil minum kopi, tetapi bukan tempat untuk bersantai lama.

reviews.author: Patrick Murtaugh
reviews.text: Excellent flat white, will be back
reviews.textTranslated: Flat white-nya enak banget, saya pasti akan kembali.

reviews.author: Brynn MacDonald
reviews.text: Woman refused to serve me a dirty chai late, gave attitude. Not returning.
reviews.textTranslated: Wanita itu menolak melayani saya dirty chai di larut malam, dan bersikap tidak sopan. Saya tidak akan kembali lagi.

reviews.author: Ramon Beach
reviews.text: Very nice.
reviews.textTranslated: Bagus sekali.

reviews.author: mike mike
reviews.text: This place is awesome...very cozy coffee shop drinks are delicious staff was great definitely recommended. Take a seat here with a cup of coffee and take a load off
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat ini luar biasa... kedai kopi yang sangat nyaman, minumannya lezat, stafnya hebat, sangat direkomendasikan. Duduklah di sini sambil menikmati secangkir kopi dan bersantailah.

reviews.author: Shaun crowe-swords
reviews.text: Super grumpy. Super good.
reviews.textTranslated: Super pemarah. Super baik.

reviews.author: Ramon Smeets (Omniradius)
reviews.text:
Just for the name alone I'm gonna give this place a thumbs up haha! Had kind of a 'hipster' vibe going on, but what coffee place doesn't these days right?! Didn't bother me anyways.
Coffee tasted great and that's what matters.
reviews.textTranslated:
Dari namanya saja, aku sudah kasih jempol untuk tempat ini, haha! Nuansanya agak hipster, tapi kedai kopi mana sih yang nggak kayak gitu, ya?! Pokoknya nggak masalah.
Kopinya enak, dan itu yang penting.

reviews.author: Seth Miller
reviews.text: 🥺 global heating will make coffee extinct
reviews.textTranslated: 🥺 Pemanasan global akan membuat kopi punah

reviews.author: Cristina Ciamarone
reviews.text: Nice place to rest and have a good espresso. Pastries are delicious too.
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat yang nyaman untuk beristirahat dan menikmati espresso yang nikmat. Kue-kuenya juga lezat.

reviews.author: Colleen O'Connor
reviews.text: Loved my oat milk cappuccino from here. And I just love the name & logo.
reviews.textTranslated: Suka banget sama cappuccino susu oat dari sini. Dan aku suka banget sama nama dan logonya.

reviews.author: Omayra Acosta
reviews.text: Friendly barista, great cup of coffee & loved the music!
reviews.textTranslated: Barista ramah, kopi enak, dan musiknya juga enak!

reviews.author: Allen Chung
reviews.text:
Worst cafe grumpy branch in new york
After one exhausting day I found out it was nothing ~
Cause the service and staff attitude is much more like a disaster.
reviews.textTranslated:
Kafe Grumpy cabang terburuk di New York
Setelah seharian melelahkan, ternyata itu bukan apa-apa ~
Karena pelayanan dan sikap stafnya jauh lebih buruk dari sekadar bencana.

reviews.author: Cecilia Tiempo
reviews.text: Love the macchiato flavor.
reviews.textTranslated: Suka rasa macchiato.

reviews.author: Mandy Gibson
reviews.text: This shop has great coffee. The iced mocha was very good!
reviews.textTranslated: Kedai ini punya kopi yang enak. Moka dinginnya enak sekali!

reviews.author: Joe Rongish
reviews.text: Okay coffee.  Okay staff.
reviews.textTranslated: Kopinya mantap. Stafnya mantap.

reviews.author: Michael Hansen
reviews.text: Coffee and service are pretty good, atmosphere is also nice. Coffee is more expensive than you would find at Starbucks and I didn’t see anything that looked unique for their shop specifically.
reviews.textTranslated: Kopi dan pelayanannya cukup bagus, suasananya juga menyenangkan. Kopinya lebih mahal daripada di Starbucks dan saya tidak melihat sesuatu yang tampak unik khusus untuk toko mereka.

reviews.author: Emily C.
reviews.text: No WiFi. More of a sit & socialize/meeting place coffee shop than a working coffee shop. Seating is a little sparse and awkward/uncomfortable (like sitting on benches with no tables or cushions) so it’s not good for long periods of time. $4.25 for a small cappuccino... pretty pricey in my opinion, but that’s NYC for you. Compared to others in the area, I wouldn’t recommend it over others. Been twice and both times it was just okay.
reviews.textTranslated: Tidak ada WiFi. Lebih cocok sebagai kedai kopi untuk duduk santai dan bersosialisasi/bertemu daripada kedai kopi untuk bekerja. Tempat duduk agak terbatas dan canggung/tidak nyaman (seperti duduk di bangku tanpa meja atau bantal) jadi tidak cocok untuk duduk dalam waktu lama. $4,25 untuk cappuccino kecil... cukup mahal menurut saya, tapi begitulah NYC. Dibandingkan dengan kedai kopi lain di daerah tersebut, saya tidak akan merekomendasikannya. Sudah dua kali ke sana dan kedua kalinya biasa saja.

reviews.author: BruceNYC
reviews.text: Excellent cold brew.
reviews.textTranslated: Minuman seduh dingin yang nikmat.

reviews.author: Alex Rick
reviews.text: The macchiato is pretty good. A little pricey but good. The music is good but a little loud. Nice seating area. Great place to go before taking the fairy.
reviews.textTranslated: Macchiato-nya lumayan enak. Agak mahal tapi enak. Musiknya bagus tapi agak keras. Area tempat duduknya nyaman. Tempat yang bagus untuk dikunjungi sebelum naik kereta gantung.

reviews.author: brian seymour
reviews.text: Coffee was disgusting. Tasted like it was made in a dirty pot. Cookie was good, though.
reviews.textTranslated: Kopinya menjijikkan. Rasanya seperti dibuat di teko kotor. Tapi kuenya enak.

reviews.author: Rich W
reviews.text: Not particularly good coffee and not the most comfortable establishment. No toilets either.
reviews.textTranslated: Kopinya tidak terlalu enak dan tempatnya juga tidak nyaman. Toiletnya juga tidak ada.

reviews.author: Luis Ortiz
reviews.text: A go-to coffee spot. Rarely crowded and always great coffee with experienced baristas.
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat ngopi favorit. Jarang ramai dan selalu menyajikan kopi enak dengan barista berpengalaman.

reviews.author: Hayley Dahle
reviews.text: Love thr coffee here but service is super slow ecen when the cafe is empty.
reviews.textTranslated: Suka kopi di sini, tapi pelayanannya sangat lambat, apalagi kalau kafenya sedang kosong.

reviews.author: James Tai
reviews.text: the maple spice latte is delicious.
reviews.textTranslated: Latte maple rempah itu enak sekali.

reviews.author: Heather Newbury
reviews.text: Great cappuccino and flat white!
reviews.textTranslated: Cappuccino dan flat white yang nikmat!

reviews.author: Kevin Hartle
reviews.text: Awesome coffee, love the logo
reviews.textTranslated: Kopi yang luar biasa, suka logonya

reviews.author: Chip Brian
reviews.text: Great cup
reviews.textTranslated: Piala besar

reviews.author: Alvin Raetzsch
reviews.text: Great little coffee shop amongst a sea of Starbucks in the financial district. I echo other reviewers on the friendliness of the staff, very warm and welcoming people.
reviews.textTranslated: Kedai kopi kecil yang bagus di tengah lautan Starbucks di kawasan keuangan. Saya setuju dengan ulasan lain tentang keramahan stafnya, orang-orang yang sangat ramah dan hangat.

reviews.author: Joachim Falck-Hansen
reviews.text: Nice place with bright minimal design, service pleasant, coffee was rather delicious.
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat yang bagus dengan desain minimalis yang cerah, pelayanannya menyenangkan, kopinya cukup enak.

reviews.author: Fei Huang
reviews.text: If you sick of Starbucks and you are around this area, this is the place to grab a good coffee. One bad thing is no restroom, you must go to next door to use one. But I guess this just general thing in Manhattan😂
reviews.textTranslated: Jika Anda bosan dengan Starbucks dan kebetulan berada di sekitar area ini, ini adalah tempat yang tepat untuk menikmati kopi yang enak. Satu hal yang kurang adalah tidak ada toilet, Anda harus pergi ke sebelah untuk menggunakannya. Tapi saya rasa ini memang hal biasa di Manhattan 😂

reviews.author: Viktor Bek
reviews.text: Clean water in this coffee makes world of difference. Whenever I have urge to actually sit down and savor the cup this is where I go.
reviews.textTranslated: Air bersih dalam kopi ini sungguh luar biasa. Kapan pun saya ingin duduk dan menikmati secangkir kopi, inilah tempat saya menyeduhnya.

reviews.author: Jeffrey Yung
reviews.text: Great service.  Very kind people working here.  Ambiance is super chillaxed.
reviews.textTranslated: Pelayanannya luar biasa. Orang-orangnya ramah sekali. Suasananya sangat santai.

reviews.author: andrew brady
reviews.text: Great coffee and really nice place. Guy working this Monday morning was super polite. ☕
reviews.textTranslated: Kopinya enak dan tempatnya juga bagus. Petugas yang bekerja Senin pagi ini sangat sopan. ☕

reviews.author: piotr moty
reviews.text: Great coffee!
reviews.textTranslated: Kopi yang enak!

reviews.author: olga ilyayeva
reviews.text: Everything here is tasty and the service is good.
reviews.textTranslated: Semua makanan di sini enak dan pelayanannya bagus.

reviews.author: H S
reviews.text: This cafe is Instagramably photogenic and yelpably delicious!
reviews.textTranslated: Kafe ini sangat fotogenik dan lezat, layak dipuji di Yelp!

reviews.author: Hemanth Gorijala
reviews.text: Awesome kauphy
reviews.textTranslated: Kauphy yang mengagumkan

reviews.author: Naty Arias
reviews.text: One of the few places in Fidi that serves good coffee/tea and is open past 6pm. Staff is friendly and service is quick.
reviews.textTranslated: Salah satu dari sedikit tempat di Fidi yang menyajikan kopi/teh enak dan buka hingga lewat jam 6 sore. Stafnya ramah dan pelayanannya cepat.

reviews.author: Patrick Pease
reviews.text: Quick friendly staff and a great flat white. Was there two weekday mornings in a row with no wait at all.
reviews.textTranslated: Stafnya ramah dan cepat, flat white-nya juga enak. Saya sudah dua pagi hari kerja berturut-turut tanpa antri sama sekali.

reviews.author: Dina Scherer
reviews.text: Love this cute coffee shop with great pastries. Nice for an afternoon espresso or matcha latte & a snack. Cozy area to sit in the back plus a communal table & window bar - perfect for people watching.
reviews.textTranslated: Suka sekali dengan kedai kopi imut ini yang memiliki kue-kue lezat. Cocok untuk menikmati espresso atau matcha latte di sore hari dan camilan. Area nyaman untuk duduk di belakang, ditambah meja komunal dan bar di dekat jendela - sempurna untuk mengamati orang-orang yang lewat.

reviews.author: William Rudebusch
reviews.text: Good coffee!
reviews.textTranslated: Kopi yang enak!

reviews.author: Paulina Leyva
reviews.text: Itd good but.. Pricey and not unique
reviews.textTranslated: Bagus tapi.. Mahal dan tidak unik

reviews.author: Rajesh Sanyal
reviews.text: Good coffee nice host
reviews.textTranslated: Kopi enak, tuan rumah ramah

reviews.author: Koichiro Tamura
reviews.text: Clean, cool coffee place. Nice alternative BGM.
reviews.textTranslated: Tempat kopi yang bersih dan sejuk. BGM alternatif yang bagus.

reviews.author: Tim P
reviews.text: Nice store, great coffee, unfriendly service.
reviews.textTranslated: Tokonya bagus, kopinya enak, tapi pelayanannya tidak ramah.

reviews.author: Sola Balisane
reviews.text: Perfect macchiato every time, and a nice, friendly environment without the usual crowd of people using it as a second office. (communal tables and no wifi! Hooray!) Seasonal, varietal coffee made with respect for the bean and no fruity concoctions.
reviews.textTranslated: Macchiato yang sempurna setiap saat, dan lingkungan yang nyaman dan ramah tanpa keramaian orang yang biasanya menjadikannya sebagai kantor kedua. (meja komunal dan tanpa wifi! Hore!) Kopi musiman dan varietas yang dibuat dengan menghormati biji kopi dan tanpa campuran buah-buahan.

reviews.author: Luke Monson
reviews.text: What an ass behind the counter.  Coffee is good tho
reviews.textTranslated: Dasar brengsek di balik meja. Kopinya enak sih.

reviews.author: Mark Rodbert
reviews.text: Only place in NYC we managed to get a decent "flat white". Great place. Fantastic coffee.
reviews.textTranslated: Satu-satunya tempat di NYC di mana kami berhasil mendapatkan "flat white" yang enak. Tempat yang bagus. Kopi yang fantastis.

reviews.author: Corey Weaver
reviews.text: Wouldn’t be surprised if this is the best coffee in the Financial District. You won’t be disappointed.
reviews.textTranslated: Tak heran kalau ini kopi terbaik di Distrik Keuangan. Anda tak akan kecewa.

reviews.author: Ali Al Rahma
reviews.text: Definitely one of the best cappuccinos I've ever had. I got the single-origin Columbia beans and it was on point. Perfect crema and milk foam. Reminds me of a great cappuccino I had daily in Florence.
reviews.textTranslated: Ini jelas salah satu cappuccino terbaik yang pernah saya minum. Saya memesan biji kopi single-origin Columbia dan rasanya sangat pas. Crema dan busa susunya sempurna. Mengingatkan saya pada cappuccino enak yang biasa saya minum setiap hari di Florence.

reviews.author: Hugo A.
reviews.text: Muy agradables, hablan español y saben lo que es un cortado. Buen servicio y café. Recomendable.
reviews.textTranslated: Sangat ramah, mereka berbicara bahasa Spanyol dan tahu apa itu cortado. Pelayanan dan kopinya enak. Sangat direkomendasikan.

reviews.author: Igor
reviews.text: Incredibly well made coffee. Ask for a Cortado - enjoy
reviews.textTranslated: Kopi yang dibuat dengan sangat baik. Minta Cortado - nikmatilah.

reviews.author: Jonathan Callahan
reviews.text: Really well executed espresso. Each visit consistently yielded a dialed in shot, even with different baristas. The cold brew was also great. Don't let the name scare you, the folks here are just focused on nailing the coffee...and that's what you came here for, right?
reviews.textTranslated: Espresso yang benar-benar sempurna. Setiap kunjungan selalu menghasilkan espresso yang pas, bahkan dengan barista yang berbeda. Cold brew-nya juga enak. Jangan biarkan namanya membuat Anda takut, orang-orang di sini hanya fokus untuk menghasilkan kopi yang sempurna... dan itulah tujuan Anda datang ke sini, bukan?

reviews.author: DogDog Wol
reviews.text: It's no surprise to anyone who's familiar with this chain that the coffee here is excellent, but, it's REALLY excellent.  A sip of their pour-over pretty much guarantees you'll never go back to any of the (many) other places in the neighborhood.
reviews.textTranslated: Tak heran bagi siapa pun yang familier dengan jaringan kedai ini kalau kopinya luar biasa, tapi, BENAR-BENAR luar biasa. Seteguk kopi tuang mereka hampir menjamin Anda tak akan pernah kembali ke (banyak) tempat lain di lingkungan ini.

reviews.author: Theodore Ullrich
reviews.text: Just opened!
reviews.textTranslated: Baru saja dibuka!
